global_rules.approval_round_strategy: Generate native approvals first, lock identity and composition, then finish only the approved finals for website delivery.
global_rules.consistency_priority: Favor likeness consistency, crop survivability, and editorial realism over novelty.

provider_parameter_policy.temperature: Omit unless the provider explicitly supports it.
provider_parameter_policy.seed: Include only if the provider supports it and a locked repeatable look is needed.

presets.use_case: Primary homepage hero and homepage fade sequence wide image
presets.recommended_native_generation: Use native wide high-res generation first rather than relying on later expansion.
presets.approval_round_goal: Approve composition, facial integrity, text-safe architecture, and realistic finish.
presets.recommended_framing: Subject offset from center with one calm negative-space field for headline and CTA copy.

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep one broad low-detail lane free of bright highlights, hands, or busy edges for desktop typography.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Keep face and upper torso protected in the central vertical corridor so a derived mobile crop still reads cleanly.
composition_language.eye_line: strong enough to read at homepage scale

realism_review_points: no generic AI glamour drift in final hero polish

presets.use_case: Mobile homepage hero and portrait-led campaign crop
presets.recommended_native_generation: Generate portrait-native first whenever possible rather than forcing a crop from desktop wides.
presets.approval_round_goal: Approve face scale, vertical balance, crop safety, and top-third readability.
presets.recommended_framing: Tight vertical portrait with controlled headroom and elegant shoulder or torso context.

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Protect a readable top or side copy zone without sacrificing facial scale.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Forehead, eyes, nose, mouth, chin, and shoulder line must remain intact inside the portrait-safe crop.
composition_language.eye_line: clear and immediate on small screens

realism_review_points: face remains recognizable at tighter crop
skin texture still looks real after mobile sharpening
no beauty-filter flattening or symmetry artifacts

presets.use_case: About page portrait, press image, and premium editorial tiles
presets.recommended_native_generation: Use portrait-native high-res generation with identity lock prioritized over styling variance.
presets.approval_round_goal: Approve facial fidelity, skin texture realism, and premium editorial lighting.
presets.recommended_framing: Chest-up or waist-up portrait depending section needs, with enough breathing room for elegant crop adjustments.

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep at least one outer edge visually calm for optional quote or biography overlays.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Protect full head and shoulder shape so portrait crops remain balanced across responsive placements.
composition_language.eye_line: direct or softly off-axis, but always emotionally readable

realism_review_points: pore detail and lip texture remain visible
facial proportions stay true under flattering light

presets.use_case: Grid cards, testimonial modules, and modular campaign thumbnails
presets.recommended_native_generation: Reuse approved editorial or hero images, then crop only from compositions that preserve face and silhouette clarity.
presets.approval_round_goal: Approve readable silhouette, crop versatility, and identity retention at smaller sizes.
presets.recommended_framing: Single-subject crop with clean shape separation from background and no edge tangles.

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Keep the crop clean enough for optional badge or micro-copy overlays without crowding the face.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Ensure facial center of gravity stays intact when cards are displayed in tighter responsive layouts.
composition_language.subject_placement: centered or slightly offset depending silhouette

realism_review_points: subject still reads as the same person at small size
skin and eyes avoid waxiness after resizing
no awkward hand, shoulder, or chin crops

presets.use_case: Launch teaser, social post, and story-adjacent promotional asset
presets.recommended_native_generation: Generate from already approved prompt concepts so campaign styling stays consistent across channels.
presets.approval_round_goal: Approve fast-scrolling impact while retaining true identity and realistic finish.
presets.recommended_framing: Bold portrait crop with strong eye line, simple background hierarchy, and immediate readability.

composition_language.text_safe_guidance: Allow a small but usable copy or logo zone without turning the frame into an ad template.
composition_language.mobile_crop_safety_guidance: Keep the core face and hero silhouette intact for story and feed variations.
composition_language.eye_line: instant and scroll-stopping without feeling aggressive

realism_review_points: high-impact crop still preserves real facial features
